name: Beacons

notes: Early-stage AI startup. Product-engineering culture, broad scope.

notes: Healthcare data platform with AI. SQL + integrations + clinical workflow.

notes: AI for legal contracts. Domain-specific LLM + agent workflows.

name: General Context
notes: Early-stage AI infra. Founding-engineer hiring; broad scope.

notes: SaaS for independent beauty/wellness pros. Booking + payments + marketing.

name: Metropolis

name: CoreWeave

name: AlphaSense
notes: NYC enterprise AI search over financial docs. Retrieval + integrations.

name: Neon
notes: Branchable serverless Postgres. Storage separation, autoscaling.

name: Ro
notes: NYC telehealth. Care plans + fulfillment + identity.

notes: NYC tech: ABC News, Hulu, ESPN+, Disney+. Streaming infra + content systems.

name: BlackRock
